---
title: "Other stats"
author: "Abby Lewis"
date: "2024-08-22"
output: html_document
---

## Overview

This file contains code to calculate relevant statistics for manuscript text.

### Table of contents:

-   Step 1: Load data and packages
-   Step 2: Calculate inundation percent


## Step 1: Load data and packages

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Load packages
library(tidyverse)

# Load data
ch4 <- read_csv(here::here("01_Data", "ch4.csv"))
```


## Step 2: Calculate inundation percent

```{r}
ch4 %>%
  summarize(n_flooded = sum(Depth_cm > 0, na.rm = T) / sum(!is.na(Depth_cm)))
```
